notes: v0.14.1 — TUTORIAL becomes a major feature: REPLAY now opens an interactive isolated sandbox per lesson (own arena, ship spawns, objective bar, end screen). Interactive lessons (movement WASD+dash, combat 3 dummies, rhythm on-beat shots, boss DPS to 0) and info slideshows (basics/modes/classes/skills/economy/quests) auto-mark complete + replay-able. PROFILE popup polish: canonical P1 hex / S3 star icons on wallet tiles (no more title overlap), simplified nav (SETTINGS · CHANGE CLASS · CHANGE NICKNAME) with first-free / 50-SURGE nickname-change dialog. CLASS locks: BASTION/LANCE/CHORUS marked COMING SOON on class tabs and onboarding wizard — only SHARD selectable. Windows only.
